On July 13, 1985, the absolute, incredibly massive, and historically unprecedented "Live Aid" benefit concert was aggressively broadcast globally. Organized heavily by Bob Geldof and Midge Ure to raise massive funds for the horrific Ethiopian famine, the massive dual-venue concert at Wembley Stadium in London and JFK Stadium in Philadelphia was watched by an estimated, staggering 1.9 billion people across 150 nations. This massive, globally unifying cultural event fundamentally revolutionized the massive scale of international humanitarian fundraising and celebrity activism.

On July 13, 1789, the absolute, terrifying, and deeply aggressive precursor to the French Revolution occurred. The massive populace of Paris, deeply impoverished and absolutely furious with the massive economic failures and absolute tyranny of King Louis XVI, aggressively engaged in massive, violent riots and looting across the city. This massive, chaotic explosion of public rage aggressively set the absolute, undeniable stage for the horrific, massive storming of the Bastille prison the very next day, fundamentally changing world history.

## SECTION 9 — This Day in History (India)
On July 13, 1931, the incredibly massive, tragic, and historically defining Kashmir Martyrs' Day aggressively occurred in Srinagar. Massive, unarmed crowds of Kashmiri Muslims aggressively gathered outside the Srinagar Central Jail to heavily protest the deeply oppressive, autocratic rule of the Dogra Maharaja Hari Singh. The incredibly brutal state police aggressively opened heavy fire on the massive, protesting crowds, resulting in the horrific deaths of 22 people. This massive, bloody massacre absolutely catalyzed the massive, organized political struggle for Kashmiri rights.

On July 13, 1974, the massive, highly emotional, and historically significant absolute repatriation of Udham Singh's remains was heavily executed. The incredible, massive Indian revolutionary, who had been brutally executed in London in 1940 for aggressively assassinating Sir Michael O'Dwyer to avenge the Jallianwala Bagh massacre, was finally brought home. His massive remains were heavily exhumed from Pentonville Prison and aggressively transported to India, where he received an absolute, massive state funeral, deeply cementing his immortal legacy as an absolute martyr of the republic.
